name: Freeport Militia
description: The brutal enforcement arm of the Council of Freeport. They maintain order in Freeport through fear and violence.

name: Guards of Qeynos
description: The honorable city guards protecting the innocent citizens of Qeynos from evil forces and criminal elements.

name: Bloodsabers
description: A sinister cult of undead worshippers operating in the shadows of Qeynos. They seek to spread undeath throughout Norrath.

name: Corrupt Qeynos Guards
description: Dishonorable guards who have sold out their city to criminal elements. They work with the Bloodsabers for personal gain.

name: Crushbone Orcs
description: The brutal orcish empire led by Emperor Crushbone on Faydwer. They wage constant war against the elves of Kelethin.

name: Runnyeye Goblins
description: The goblin inhabitants of the Runnyeye Citadel. Dangerous and unpredictable, they raid settlements throughout the Karanas.

name: Claws of Veeshan
description: The council of ancient dragons in Velious who guard the secrets of the dragon goddess Veeshan. Gaining their trust is extraordinarily difficult.

name: Coldain
description: The hardy dwarf-like inhabitants of Velious who have survived harsh conditions for millennia. They wage endless war against the Kromzek giants.

name: Kromzek
description: The powerful Velious frost giant clan that rules Kael Drakkel. They despise the Coldain dwarves and seek to dominate Velious.

name: Kromrif
description: The lesser frost giant clan allied with the Kromzek. They serve as foot soldiers in the ongoing war against the Coldain.

name: Priests of Life
description: The devoted clergy of the Church of Qeynos who serve the god Karana. They provide healing and spiritual guidance to the city's inhabitants.

name: Heretics
description: Followers of Innoruuk, the Prince of Hate, who have established a stronghold in the Plane of Hate. They are fanatically devoted to spreading hatred.

name: Ring of Scale
description: The militant dragon faction in Kunark that seeks to dominate and subjugate all other races. They command armies of sarnak and other minions.

name: Merchants of Qeynos
description: The mercantile guild controlling commerce in and around Qeynos. They deal with all races and factions for profit.

name: Kithicor Undead
description: The restless undead spirits haunting the Kithicor forest following an ancient battle. They are eternally hostile to all living creatures.
